DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-20-2022 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS MUSIC CITY HOTEL LP and PACIFIC EQUITIES WEST, LLC'S DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties meet and confer "in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. CCP 430.41(a)(3)(A) requires the demurring party to file a declaration stating "the means by which the demurring party met and conferred." Defendants' response to the complaint is now due by May 18, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
